    23→# Operational Invariants (RBGG is single writer; 409 is fatal)
    24→#

    26→#   identity. There are no concurrent writers in the same project.
    27→# - Pristine-state expectation: RBGG init/creation flows assume the project
    28→#   is pristine for the resources they manage. If a resource "already exists"
    29→#   (HTTP 409), that's treated as state drift or prior manual activity.
    30→# - Policy: All HTTP 409 Conflict responses are fatal (buc_die). We do not
    31→#   treat 409 as idempotent success anywhere in RBGG.
    32→#   If you see a 409, resolve state drift first (destroy/reset), then rerun.
    33→# ----------------------------------------------------------------------
    34→
    35→set -euo pipefail
    36→
    37→# Multiple inclusion detection
    38→test -z "${ZRBGG_SOURCED:-}" || buc_die "Module rbgg multiply sourced - check sourcing hierarchy"

    41→######################################################################
    42→# Internal Functions (zrbgg_*)

    44→zrbgg_kindle() {
    45→  test -z "${ZRBGG_KINDLED:-}" || buc_die "Module rbgg already kindled"
    46→
    47→  test -n "${RBRR_DEPOT_PROJECT_ID:-}"     || buc_die "RBRR_DEPOT_PROJECT_ID is not set"
    48→  test   "${#RBRR_DEPOT_PROJECT_ID}" -gt 0 || buc_die "RBRR_DEPOT_PROJECT_ID is empty"

    51→  zrbgc_sentinel
    52→  zrbgo_sentinel
    53→  zrbgu_sentinel
    54→  zrbgi_sentinel
    55→
    56→  readonly ZRBGG_PREFIX="${BURD_TEMP_DIR}/rbgg_"
    57→  readonly ZRBGG_EMPTY_JSON="${ZRBGG_PREFIX}empty.json"
    58→  printf '{}' > "${ZRBGG_EMPTY_JSON}"
    59→
    60→  # Infix values for HTTP operations
    61→  readonly ZRBGG_INFIX_CREATE="create"
    62→  readonly ZRBGG_INFIX_VERIFY="verify"
    63→  readonly ZRBGG_INFIX_KEY="key"
    64→  readonly ZRBGG_INFIX_API_IAM_ENABLE="api_iam_enable"

    98→######################################################################
    99→# Rubric infrastructure preflight — sources Governor RBRA, checks repo URL + DevConnect
   100→
   101→zrbgg_rubric_preflight() {
   102→  zrbgg_sentinel
   103→
   104→  local z_gov_rbra="${RBDC_GOVERNOR_RBRA_FILE}"
   105→  test -f "${z_gov_rbra}" || buc_die "Governor RBRA file not found: ${z_gov_rbra} — run rbgp_governor_reset"
   106→
   107→  if test -z "${ZRBRA_SOURCED:-}"; then
   108→    source "${BASH_SOURCE[0]%/*}/rbra_regime.sh"
   109→  fi
   110→
   111→  source "${z_gov_rbra}" || buc_die "Failed to source Governor RBRA: ${z_gov_rbra}"
   112→  zrbra_kindle
   113→  zrbra_enforce
   114→
   115→  rbgu_check_rubric_repo_url "${RBRR_RUBRIC_REPO_URL:-}"
   116→
   117→  local z_token
   118→  z_token=$(rbgu_get_governor_token_capture) || buc_die "Failed to get Governor OAuth token for CB v2 check"
   119→
   120→  # Verify CB v2 connection is active
   121→  local -r z_cbv2_conn="${RBRR_CBV2_CONNECTION_NAME:-}"
   122→  test -n "${z_cbv2_conn}" || buc_die "RBRR_CBV2_CONNECTION_NAME not set — run depot_create to establish CB v2 connection"
   123→
   124→  local -r z_cbv2_conn_url="${RBGC_API_ROOT_CLOUDBUILD_V2}${RBGC_CLOUDBUILD_V2}/projects/${RBRR_DEPOT_PROJECT_ID}/locations/${RBRR_GCP_REGION}/connections/${z_cbv2_conn}"
   125→  rbgu_http_json "GET" "${z_cbv2_conn_url}" "${z_token}" "rubric_cbv2_check"
   126→  rbgu_http_require_ok "CB v2 connection check" "rubric_cbv2_check"
   127→
   128→  local z_cbv2_stage

   130→    || buc_die "Failed to parse CB v2 connection stage"
   131→
   132→  test "${z_cbv2_stage}" = "COMPLETE" \
   133→    || buc_die "CB v2 connection not active (stage: ${z_cbv2_stage}) — re-run depot_create"
   134→
   135→  buc_log_args "CB v2 connection active (${z_cbv2_conn})"

   140→######################################################################
   141→# Capture: list required services that are NOT enabled (blank = all enabled)
   142→zrbgg_required_apis_missing_capture() {
   143→  zrbgg_sentinel
   144→
   145→  local z_token="${1:-}"
   146→  test -n "${z_token}" || { echo ""; return 1; }
   147→
   148→  local z_missing=""
   149→  local z_api=""
   150→  local z_service=""
   151→  local z_infix=""
   152→  local z_state=""
   153→  local z_code=""
   154→
   155→  for z_api in                       \
   156→    "${RBGC_API_SU_VERIFY_CRM}"      \
   157→    "${RBGC_API_SU_VERIFY_GAR}"      \
   158→    "${RBGC_API_SU_VERIFY_IAM}"      \
   159→    "${RBGC_API_SU_VERIFY_BUILD}"    \
   160→    "${RBGC_API_SU_VERIFY_ANALYSIS}" \
   161→    "${RBGC_API_SU_VERIFY_STORAGE}"
   162→  do
   163→    z_service="${z_api##*/}"
   164→    z_infix="${ZRBGG_INFIX_API_CHECK}_${z_service}"
   165→
   166→    rbgu_http_json "GET" "${z_api}" "${z_token}" "${z_infix}" || true
   167→
   168→    buc_log_args 'If we cannot even read an HTTP code file, that is a processing failure.'
   169→    z_code=$(rbgu_http_code_capture "${z_infix}") || z_code=""
   170→    test -n "${z_code}" || return 1
   171→
   172→    if test "${z_code}" = "200"; then
   173→      z_state=$(rbgu_json_field_capture "${z_infix}" ".state") || z_state=""
   174→      test "${z_state}" = "ENABLED" || z_missing="${z_missing} ${z_service}"
   175→    else
   176→      buc_log_args 'Any non-200 (403/404/5xx/etc) => treat as NOT enabled'
   177→      z_missing="${z_missing} ${z_service}"
   178→    fi
   179→  done
   180→
   181→  printf '%s' "${z_missing# }"
   182→}

   184→zrbgg_create_service_account_with_key() {
   185→  zrbgg_sentinel
   186→
   187→  local z_account_name="$1"
   188→  local z_display_name="$2"
   189→  local z_description="$3"
   190→  local z_instance="$4"
   191→
   192→  local z_account_email="${z_account_name}@${RBGD_SA_EMAIL_FULL}"
   193→
   194→  buc_step 'Get OAuth token from admin'
   195→  local z_token
   196→  z_token=$(rbgu_get_governor_token_capture) || buc_die "Failed to get admin token"
   197→
   198→  buc_step "Create request JSON for ${z_account_name}"
   199→  jq -n                                      \
   200→    --arg account_id "${z_account_name}"     \
   201→    --arg display_name "${z_display_name}"   \
   202→    --arg description "${z_description}"     \
   203→    '{
   204→      accountId: $account_id,
   205→      serviceAccount: {
   206→        displayName: $display_name,
   207→        description: $description
   208→      }
   209→    }' > "${ZRBGG_PREFIX}create_request.json" || buc_die "Failed to create request JSON"
   210→
   211→  buc_step 'Create service account via REST API'
   212→  rbgu_http_json "POST" "${RBGD_API_SERVICE_ACCOUNTS}" "${z_token}" \
   213→    "${ZRBGG_INFIX_CREATE}" "${ZRBGG_PREFIX}create_request.json"
   214→  rbgu_http_require_ok "Create service account" "${ZRBGG_INFIX_CREATE}"
   215→
   216→  local z_sa_uid
   217→  z_sa_uid=$(rbgu_json_field_capture "${ZRBGG_INFIX_CREATE}" '.uniqueId') \
   218→    || buc_die "Failed to get uniqueId from SA creation response"
   219→  buc_info "Service account created: ${z_account_email} (uid: ${z_sa_uid})"
   220→
   221→  rbgu_poll_until_ok "SA propagation (by email)" \
   222→    "${RBGD_API_SERVICE_ACCOUNTS}/${z_account_email}" "${z_token}" "${ZRBGG_INFIX_VERIFY}"
   223→
   224→  buc_step 'Preflight: ensure no existing USER_MANAGED keys (manual cleanup path)'
   225→
   226→  buc_log_args 'List keys'
   227→  rbgu_http_json "GET"                                                        \
   228→    "${RBGD_API_SERVICE_ACCOUNTS}/${z_account_email}${RBGC_PATH_KEYS}"        \
   229→                                      "${z_token}" "${ZRBGG_INFIX_LIST_KEYS}"
   230→  rbgu_http_require_ok "List service account keys" "${ZRBGG_INFIX_LIST_KEYS}"
   231→
   232→  buc_log_args 'Count existing user-managed keys'
   233→  local z_user_keys
   234→  z_user_keys=$(jq -r '[.keys[]? | select(.keyType=="USER_MANAGED")] | length' \
   235→                 "${ZRBGU_PREFIX}${ZRBGG_INFIX_LIST_KEYS}${ZRBGU_POSTFIX_JSON}") \
   236→    || buc_die "Failed to parse service account keys"
   237→
   238→  if test "${z_user_keys}" -gt 0; then
   239→    buc_log_args 'Provide a console URL to delete keys manually, then rerun this command'
   240→    local z_sa_email_enc="${z_account_email//@/%40}"
   241→    local z_keys_url="${RBGC_CONSOLE_URL}iam-admin/serviceaccounts/details/${z_sa_email_enc}?project=${RBRR_DEPOT_PROJECT_ID}"
   242→
   243→    buc_warn "Found ${z_user_keys} existing USER_MANAGED key(s) on ${z_account_email}."
   244→    buc_info "Open Console, select the **Keys** tab, delete old keys, then rerun:"
   245→    buc_info "  ${z_keys_url}"
   246→    buc_die  "Aborting to avoid minting additional keys."
   247→  fi
   248→
   249→  buc_step 'Generate service account key'
   250→  local z_key_req="${BURD_TEMP_DIR}/rbgg_key_request.json"
   251→  printf '%s' '{"privateKeyType": "TYPE_GOOGLE_CREDENTIALS_FILE"}' > "${z_key_req}"
   252→  rbgu_http_json "POST" "${RBGD_API_SERVICE_ACCOUNTS}/${z_account_email}${RBGC_PATH_KEYS}" \
   253→                                         "${z_token}" "${ZRBGG_INFIX_KEY}" "${z_key_req}"
   254→  rbgu_http_require_ok "Generate service account key" "${ZRBGG_INFIX_KEY}"
   255→
   256→  buc_step 'Extract and decode key data'
   257→  local z_key_b64
   258→  z_key_b64=$(rbgu_json_field_capture "${ZRBGG_INFIX_KEY}" '.privateKeyData') \
   259→    || buc_die "Failed to extract privateKeyData"
   260→  local z_key_json="${BURD_TEMP_DIR}/rbgg_key_${z_instance}.json"
   261→  buc_log_args 'Tolerate macos base64 difference'
   262→  if ! printf '%s' "${z_key_b64}" | base64 -d > "${z_key_json}" 2>/dev/null; then
   263→       printf '%s' "${z_key_b64}" | base64 -D > "${z_key_json}" 2>/dev/null \
   264→      || buc_die "Failed to decode key data"
   265→  fi
   266→
   267→  buc_step 'Convert JSON key to RBRA format'
   268→  local z_rbra_file="${BURD_OUTPUT_DIR}/${z_instance}.rbra"
   269→
   270→  local z_client_email
   271→  z_client_email=$(jq -r '.client_email' "${z_key_json}") || buc_die "Failed to extract client_email"
   272→  test -n "${z_client_email}" || buc_die "Empty client_email in key JSON"
   273→
   274→  local z_private_key
   275→  z_private_key=$(jq -r '.private_key' "${z_key_json}") || buc_die "Failed to extract private_key"
   276→  test -n "${z_private_key}" || buc_die "Empty private_key in key JSON"
   277→
   278→  local z_project_id
   279→  z_project_id=$(jq -r '.project_id' "${z_key_json}") || buc_die "Failed to extract project_id"
   280→  test -n "${z_project_id}" || buc_die "Empty project_id in key JSON"
   281→
   282→  buc_step 'Write RBRA file' "${z_rbra_file}"
   283→  {
   284→    printf 'RBRA_CLIENT_EMAIL="%s"\n'      "$z_client_email"
   285→    printf 'RBRA_PRIVATE_KEY="'; printf '%s' "$z_private_key"; printf '"\n'
   286→    printf 'RBRA_PROJECT_ID="%s"\n'        "$z_project_id"
   287→    printf 'RBRA_TOKEN_LIFETIME_SEC=1800\n'
   288→  } > "${z_rbra_file}" || buc_die "Failed to write RBRA file ${z_rbra_file}"
   289→
   290→  test -f "${z_rbra_file}" || buc_die "Failed to write RBRA file ${z_rbra_file}"
   291→
   292→  rm -f "${z_key_json}"
   293→  buc_info "RBRA file written: ${z_rbra_file}"
   294→
   295→  # Echo uniqueId to stdout for callers (all logging goes to stderr per BCG)
   296→  printf '%s' "${z_sa_uid}"
   297→}

   299→zrbgg_create_gcs_bucket() {
   300→  zrbgg_sentinel
   301→
   302→  local z_token="${1}"
   303→  local z_bucket_name="${2}"
   304→
   305→  buc_log_args 'Create bucket request JSON for '"${z_bucket_name}"
   306→  local z_bucket_req="${BURD_TEMP_DIR}/rbgg_bucket_create_req.json"
   307→  jq -n --arg name "${z_bucket_name}" --arg location "${RBGC_GAR_LOCATION}" '
   308→{
   309→  name: $name,
   310→  location: $location,
   311→  storageClass: "STANDARD",
   312→  lifecycle: { rule: [ { action: { type: "Delete" }, condition: { age: 1 } } ] }
   313→}' > "${z_bucket_req}" || buc_die "Failed to create bucket request JSON"
   314→
   315→  buc_log_args 'Send bucket creation request'
   316→  local z_code
   317→  local z_err
   318→  rbgu_http_json "POST" "${RBGD_API_GCS_BUCKET_CREATE}" "${z_token}" \
   319→                                  "${ZRBGG_INFIX_BUCKET_CREATE}" "${z_bucket_req}"
   320→  z_code=$(rbgu_http_code_capture "${ZRBGG_INFIX_BUCKET_CREATE}") || buc_die "Bad bucket creation HTTP code"
   321→  z_err=$(rbgu_json_field_capture "${ZRBGG_INFIX_BUCKET_CREATE}" '.error.message') || z_err="HTTP ${z_code}"
   322→
   323→  case "${z_code}" in
   324→    200|201) buc_info "Bucket ${z_bucket_name} created";                    return 0 ;;
   325→    409)     buc_die  "Bucket ${z_bucket_name} already exists (pristine-state violation)" ;;
   326→    *)       buc_die  "Failed to create bucket: ${z_err}"                             ;;
   327→  esac
   328→}

   330→zrbgg_list_bucket_objects_capture() {
   331→  zrbgg_sentinel
   332→
   333→  local z_token="${1}"
   334→  local z_bucket_name="${2}"
   335→
   336→  local z_list_url_base="${RBGC_API_ROOT_STORAGE}${RBGC_STORAGE_JSON_V1}/b/${z_bucket_name}/o"
   337→  local z_page_token=""
   338→  local z_first=1
   339→
   340→  while :; do
   341→    buc_log_args "Build URL with optional pageToken -> ${z_first}"
   342→    local z_url="${z_list_url_base}"
   343→    if test -n "${z_page_token}"; then
   344→      buc_log_args 'pageToken must be URL-encoded'
   345→      local z_tok_enc
   346→      z_tok_enc=$(rbgu_urlencode_capture "${z_page_token}") || return 1
   347→      z_url="${z_url}?pageToken=${z_tok_enc}"
   348→    fi
   349→
   350→    buc_log_args 'Use a unique infix per page to avoid clobbering files'
   351→    local z_infix="${ZRBGG_INFIX_BUCKET_LIST}${z_first}"
   352→    rbgu_http_json "GET" "${z_url}" "${z_token}" "${z_infix}"
   353→
   354→    local z_code
   355→    z_code=$(rbgu_http_code_capture "${z_infix}") || return 1
   356→    test "${z_code}" = "200" || return 1
   357→
   358→    buc_log_args 'Print names from this page (if any)'
   359→    buc_log_args 'Next page?'
   360→    jq -r                '.items[]?.name // empty' "${ZRBGU_PREFIX}${z_infix}${ZRBGU_POSTFIX_JSON}"  || return 1
   361→    z_page_token=$(jq -r '.nextPageToken // empty' "${ZRBGU_PREFIX}${z_infix}${ZRBGU_POSTFIX_JSON}") || return 1
   362→
   363→    test -n "${z_page_token}" || break
   364→    z_first=$((z_first + 1))
   365→  done

   384→zrbgg_empty_gcs_bucket() {
   385→  zrbgg_sentinel
   386→
   387→  local z_token="${1}"
   388→  local z_bucket_name="${2}"
   389→
   390→  buc_log_args 'Get list of objects to delete'
   391→  local z_objects
   392→  z_objects=$(zrbgg_list_bucket_objects_capture "${z_token}" "${z_bucket_name}") || {
   393→    buc_log_args 'No objects found or bucket not accessible'
   394→    return 0
   395→  }
   396→
   397→  test -n "${z_objects}" || { buc_log_args 'Bucket is empty'; return 0; }
   398→
   399→  buc_log_args 'Delete each object'
   400→  local z_object=""
   401→  local z_delete_url=""
   402→  local z_delete_code=""
   403→  while IFS= read -r z_object; do
   404→    test -n "${z_object}" || continue
   405→    buc_log_args "Deleting object: ${z_object}"
   406→
   407→    local z_object_enc
   408→    z_object_enc=$(rbgu_urlencode_capture "${z_object}") || z_object_enc=""
   409→    test -n "${z_object_enc}" || { buc_warn "Failed to encode object name: ${z_object}"; continue; }
   410→    z_delete_url="${RBGC_API_ROOT_STORAGE}${RBGC_STORAGE_JSON_V1}/b/${z_bucket_name}/o/${z_object_enc}"
   411→
   412→    rbgu_http_json "DELETE" "${z_delete_url}" \
   413→                              "${z_token}" "${ZRBGG_INFIX_OBJECT_DELETE}"
   414→    z_delete_code=$(rbgu_http_code_capture "${ZRBGG_INFIX_OBJECT_DELETE}") || z_delete_code=""
   415→    case "${z_delete_code}" in
   416→      204|404) buc_log_args "Object ${z_object}: deleted or not found"                     ;;
   417→      *)       buc_warn     "Object ${z_object}: Failed to delete (HTTP ${z_delete_code})" ;;
   418→    esac
   419→  done <<< "${z_objects}"
   420→}

   433→  local z_err

   435→  rbgu_http_json "DELETE" "${z_delete_url}" \
   436→                      "${z_token}" "${ZRBGG_INFIX_BUCKET_DELETE}"

   438→  z_err=$(rbgu_json_field_capture "${ZRBGG_INFIX_BUCKET_DELETE}" '.error.message') || z_err="HTTP ${z_code}"
   439→  case "${z_code}" in

   544→rbgg_create_director() {
   545→  zrbgg_sentinel
   546→
   547→  local z_instance="${1:-}"
   548→
   549→  buc_doc_brief "Create Director service account instance"
   550→  buc_doc_param "instance" "Instance name (required)"
   551→  buc_doc_shown || return 0
   552→
   553→  test -n "${z_instance}"     || buc_die "Instance name required"
   554→  zburd_sentinel
   555→  test -d "${BURD_OUTPUT_DIR}" || buc_die "BURD_OUTPUT_DIR does not exist: ${BURD_OUTPUT_DIR}"
   556→
   557→  buc_step 'Rubric infrastructure preflight'
   558→  zrbgg_rubric_preflight
   559→
   560→  local z_account_name="${RBGC_DIRECTOR_PREFIX}-${z_instance}"
   561→  local z_account_email="${z_account_name}@${RBGD_SA_EMAIL_FULL}"
   562→
   563→  buc_step "Creating Director service account: ${z_account_name}"
   564→
   565→  zrbgg_create_service_account_with_key                      \
   566→    "${z_account_name}"                                    \
   567→    "Recipe Bottle Director (${z_instance})"               \
   568→    "Create/destroy container images for ${z_instance}"    \
   569→    "${z_instance}" > /dev/null || buc_die "Failed to create Director SA"
   570→
   571→  buc_step 'Get OAuth token from admin'
   572→  local z_token
   573→  z_token=$(rbgu_get_governor_token_capture) || buc_die "Failed to get admin token"
   574→
   575→  buc_step 'Get project number for Cloud Build SA'
   576→  rbgu_http_json "GET" "${RBGD_API_CRM_GET_PROJECT}" "${z_token}" "${ZRBGG_INFIX_PROJECT_INFO}"
   577→  rbgu_http_require_ok "Get project info"                         "${ZRBGG_INFIX_PROJECT_INFO}"
   578→
   579→  local z_project_number
   580→  z_project_number=$(rbgu_json_field_capture "${ZRBGG_INFIX_PROJECT_INFO}" '.projectNumber') \
   581→    || buc_die "Failed to extract project number"
   582→
   583→  buc_step 'Adding Cloud Build Editor role (project scope)'
   584→  rbgi_add_project_iam_role                 \
   585→    "${z_token}"                            \
   586→    "Grant Cloud Build Editor"              \
   587→    "${RBGD_PROJECT_RESOURCE}"              \
   588→    "${RBGC_ROLE_CLOUDBUILD_BUILDS_EDITOR}" \
   589→    "serviceAccount:${z_account_email}"     \
   590→    "director-cb"
   591→
   592→  rbgi_add_project_iam_role                 \
   593→    "${z_token}"                            \
   594→    "Grant Project Viewer"                  \
   595→    "${RBGD_PROJECT_RESOURCE}"              \
   596→    "roles/viewer"                          \
   597→    "serviceAccount:${z_account_email}"     \
   598→    "director-viewer"
   599→
   600→  buc_step 'Grant Secret Manager access on GitLab api token secret'
   601→  local -r z_director_secret_resource="projects/${RBRR_DEPOT_PROJECT_ID}/secrets/${RBGC_CBV2_API_TOKEN_SECRET_NAME}"
   602→  local -r z_director_secret_iam_get_url="${RBGC_API_ROOT_SECRETMANAGER}${RBGC_SECRETMANAGER_V1}/${z_director_secret_resource}:getIamPolicy"
   603→  rbgu_http_json "GET" "${z_director_secret_iam_get_url}" "${z_token}" "director_secret_get_iam"
   604→  local z_director_secret_get_code
   605→  z_director_secret_get_code=$(rbgu_http_code_capture "director_secret_get_iam") || z_director_secret_get_code=""
   606→  test "${z_director_secret_get_code}" = "200" \
   607→    || buc_die "Failed to read IAM policy on secret ${RBGC_CBV2_API_TOKEN_SECRET_NAME} (HTTP ${z_director_secret_get_code}) — cannot safely add Director binding without reading existing policy"
   608→
   609→  # Complete policy: Director + CB service agent both need secretAccessor.
   610→  # Writing all expected bindings in one setIamPolicy prevents the read-modify-write
   611→  # race where a stale getIamPolicy could omit depot_create's CB service agent binding.
   612→  local -r z_cb_service_agent="serviceAccount:service-${z_project_number}@gcp-sa-cloudbuild.${RBGC_SA_EMAIL_DOMAIN}"
   613→
   614→  local z_director_secret_partial_policy
   615→  z_director_secret_partial_policy=$(rbgu_jq_add_member_to_role_capture "director_secret_get_iam" \
   616→    "roles/secretmanager.secretAccessor" "serviceAccount:${z_account_email}" "") \
   617→    || buc_die "Failed to add Director binding to secret IAM policy"
   618→
   619→  local -r z_secret_intermediate="${BURD_TEMP_DIR}/rbgu_director_secret_complete_iam_u_resp.json"
   620→  printf '%s\n' "${z_director_secret_partial_policy}" > "${z_secret_intermediate}" \
   621→    || buc_die "Failed to write intermediate secret IAM policy"
   622→
   623→  local z_director_secret_updated_policy
   624→  z_director_secret_updated_policy=$(rbgu_jq_add_member_to_role_capture "director_secret_complete_iam" \
   625→    "roles/secretmanager.secretAccessor" "${z_cb_service_agent}" "") \
   626→    || buc_die "Failed to add CB service agent binding to secret IAM policy"
   627→
   628→  local -r z_director_secret_set_url="${RBGC_API_ROOT_SECRETMANAGER}${RBGC_SECRETMANAGER_V1}/${z_director_secret_resource}:setIamPolicy"
   629→  local -r z_director_secret_set_body="${BURD_TEMP_DIR}/rbgg_director_secret_iam.json"
   630→  printf '{"policy":%s}\n' "${z_director_secret_updated_policy}" > "${z_director_secret_set_body}" \
   631→    || buc_die "Failed to write director secret IAM policy body"
   632→
   633→  rbgu_http_json "POST" "${z_director_secret_set_url}" "${z_token}" "director_secret_set_iam" "${z_director_secret_set_body}"
   634→  rbgu_http_require_ok "Grant director secret access" "director_secret_set_iam"
   635→
   636→  buc_step 'Grant serviceAccountUser on Mason'
   637→  rbgi_add_sa_iam_role "${z_token}" "${RBGD_MASON_EMAIL}" "${z_account_email}" "roles/iam.serviceAccountUser"
   638→
   639→  buc_step 'Grant Storage Object Creator on artifacts bucket (only if pre-upload used)'
   640→  rbgi_add_bucket_iam_role "${z_token}" "${RBGD_GCS_BUCKET}" "${z_account_email}" "roles/storage.objectCreator"
   641→  rbgi_add_bucket_iam_role "${z_token}" "${RBGD_GCS_BUCKET}" "${z_account_email}" "roles/storage.objectViewer"
   642→
   643→  buc_step 'Grant Artifact Registry roles (complete expected policy)'
   644→  # Complete policy: Director repoAdmin + Mason writer in one setIamPolicy.
   645→  # Prevents read-modify-write race where stale getIamPolicy omits Mason's binding.
   646→  local -r z_gar_resource="projects/${RBGD_GAR_PROJECT_ID}/locations/${RBGD_GAR_LOCATION}/repositories/${RBRR_GAR_REPOSITORY}"
   647→  local -r z_gar_get_url="${RBGC_API_ROOT_ARTIFACTREGISTRY}${RBGC_ARTIFACTREGISTRY_V1}/${z_gar_resource}:getIamPolicy"
   648→  local -r z_gar_set_url="${RBGC_API_ROOT_ARTIFACTREGISTRY}${RBGC_ARTIFACTREGISTRY_V1}/${z_gar_resource}:setIamPolicy"
   649→  local -r z_gar_empty_body="${BURD_TEMP_DIR}/rbgg_gar_empty.json"
   650→  printf '{}' > "${z_gar_empty_body}"
   651→
   652→  local z_gar_prop_delay=3
   653→  local z_gar_prop_elapsed=0
   654→  local -r z_gar_prop_deadline=420
   655→  local z_gar_prop_attempt=0
   656→
   657→  while :; do
   658→    z_gar_prop_attempt=$((z_gar_prop_attempt + 1))
   659→    local z_gar_get_infix="director_gar_get_iam-${z_gar_prop_elapsed}s"
   660→    local z_gar_set_infix="director_gar_set_iam-${z_gar_prop_elapsed}s"
   661→
   662→    rbgu_http_json "POST" "${z_gar_get_url}" "${z_token}" "${z_gar_get_infix}" "${z_gar_empty_body}"
   663→    local z_gar_get_code
   664→    z_gar_get_code=$(rbgu_http_code_capture "${z_gar_get_infix}") || z_gar_get_code=""
   665→
   666→    # Propagation retry: newly-created Director SA may not be visible yet
   667→    if test "${z_gar_get_code}" = "400"; then
   668→      local z_gar_get_err=""
   669→      z_gar_get_err=$(rbgu_error_message_capture "${z_gar_get_infix}") || z_gar_get_err=""
   670→      case "${z_gar_get_err}" in
   671→        *"does not exist"*|*"is not deleted"*)
   672→          test "${z_gar_prop_elapsed}" -lt "${z_gar_prop_deadline}" \
   673→            || buc_die "GAR IAM: propagation timeout after ${z_gar_prop_elapsed}s"
   674→          buc_log_args "GAR getIamPolicy propagation delay (attempt ${z_gar_prop_attempt}, ${z_gar_prop_elapsed}s)"
   675→          sleep "${z_gar_prop_delay}"
   676→          z_gar_prop_elapsed=$((z_gar_prop_elapsed + z_gar_prop_delay))
   677→          z_gar_prop_delay=$((z_gar_prop_delay * 2))
   678→          test "${z_gar_prop_delay}" -le 20 || z_gar_prop_delay=20
   679→          continue
   680→          ;;
   681→      esac
   682→    fi
   683→
   684→    if test "${z_gar_get_code}" = "404"; then
   685→      rbgu_write_vanilla_json "${z_gar_get_infix}"
   686→    else
   687→      rbgu_http_require_ok "Get GAR repo IAM policy" "${z_gar_get_infix}"
   688→    fi
   689→
   690→    # Build complete expected policy: Director repoAdmin + Mason writer
   691→    local z_gar_partial
   692→    z_gar_partial=$(rbgu_jq_add_member_to_role_capture "${z_gar_get_infix}" \
   693→      "roles/artifactregistry.repoAdmin" "serviceAccount:${z_account_email}" "") \
   694→      || buc_die "Failed to add Director repoAdmin to GAR IAM policy"
   695→
   696→    local z_gar_intermediate="${BURD_TEMP_DIR}/rbgu_director_gar_complete_iam_u_resp.json"
   697→    printf '%s\n' "${z_gar_partial}" > "${z_gar_intermediate}" \
   698→      || buc_die "Failed to write intermediate GAR IAM policy"
   699→
   700→    local z_gar_complete
   701→    z_gar_complete=$(rbgu_jq_add_member_to_role_capture "director_gar_complete_iam" \
   702→      "roles/artifactregistry.writer" "serviceAccount:${RBGD_MASON_EMAIL}" "") \
   703→      || buc_die "Failed to add Mason writer to GAR IAM policy"
   704→
   705→    local z_gar_set_body="${BURD_TEMP_DIR}/rbgg_gar_complete_policy_body.json"
   706→    printf '{"policy":%s}\n' "${z_gar_complete}" > "${z_gar_set_body}" \
   707→      || buc_die "Failed to write GAR setIamPolicy body"
   708→    rbgu_http_json "POST" "${z_gar_set_url}" "${z_token}" "${z_gar_set_infix}" "${z_gar_set_body}"
   709→
   710→    local z_gar_set_code
   711→    z_gar_set_code=$(rbgu_http_code_capture "${z_gar_set_infix}") || buc_die "No HTTP code from GAR setIamPolicy"
   712→
   713→    # Propagation retry on SET
   714→    if test "${z_gar_set_code}" = "400"; then
   715→      local z_gar_set_err=""
   716→      z_gar_set_err=$(rbgu_error_message_capture "${z_gar_set_infix}") || z_gar_set_err=""
   717→      case "${z_gar_set_err}" in
   718→        *"does not exist"*|*"is not deleted"*)
   719→          test "${z_gar_prop_elapsed}" -lt "${z_gar_prop_deadline}" \
   720→            || buc_die "GAR IAM: propagation timeout after ${z_gar_prop_elapsed}s"
   721→          buc_log_args "GAR setIamPolicy propagation delay (attempt ${z_gar_prop_attempt}, ${z_gar_prop_elapsed}s)"
   722→          sleep "${z_gar_prop_delay}"
   723→          z_gar_prop_elapsed=$((z_gar_prop_elapsed + z_gar_prop_delay))
   724→          z_gar_prop_delay=$((z_gar_prop_delay * 2))
   725→          test "${z_gar_prop_delay}" -le 20 || z_gar_prop_delay=20
   726→          continue
   727→          ;;
   728→      esac
   729→    fi
   730→
   731→    rbgu_http_require_ok "Set GAR repo IAM policy (complete)" "${z_gar_set_infix}"
   732→    break
   733→  done
   734→
   735→  local z_actual_rbra_file="${BURD_OUTPUT_DIR}/${z_instance}.rbra"
   736→
   737→  buc_info "RBRA file written: ${z_actual_rbra_file}"
   738→  buc_info ""
   739→  buc_info "Install the RBRA file:"
   740→  buc_bare "        cp ${z_actual_rbra_file} ${RBDC_DIRECTOR_RBRA_FILE}"
   741→}

   769→rbgg_destroy_project() {
   770→  zrbgg_sentinel
   771→  buc_doc_brief "DEPRECATED: Use rbgp_project_delete instead - moved to Payor module for billing/destructive ops"
   772→  buc_doc_shown || return 0
   773→
   774→  buc_warn "========================================================================"
   775→  buc_warn "DEPRECATION NOTICE: rbgg_destroy_project is deprecated"
   776→  buc_warn "========================================================================"
   777→  buc_warn ""
   778→  buc_warn "Project deletion has been moved to the Payor module which handles"
   779→  buc_warn "all billing and destructive lifecycle operations."
   780→  buc_warn ""
   781→  buc_warn "Use instead:"
   782→  buc_warn "  rbgp_project_delete - Full project deletion with proper safeguards"
   783→  buc_warn ""
   784→  buc_warn "The Payor module provides additional features like lien management,"
   785→  buc_warn "billing detachment, and project restoration capabilities."
   786→  buc_warn "========================================================================"
   787→
   788→  buc_die "Function moved to Payor module - use rbgp_project_delete"
   789→
   790→  if [[ "${DEBUG_ONLY:-0}" != "1" ]]; then
   791→    buc_die "This dangerous operation requires DEBUG_ONLY=1 environment variable"
   792→  fi
   793→
   794→  buc_step 'Mint admin OAuth token'
   795→  local z_token
   796→  z_token=$(rbgu_get_governor_token_capture) || buc_die "Failed to get admin token"
   797→
   798→  buc_step 'Triple confirmation required'
   799→  buc_warn ""
   800→  buc_warn "========================================================================"
   801→  buc_warn "CRITICAL WARNING: You are about to PERMANENTLY DELETE the entire project:"
   802→  buc_warn "  Project: ${RBRR_DEPOT_PROJECT_ID}"
   803→  buc_warn "This will:"
   804→  buc_warn "  - Delete ALL resources in the project"
   805→  buc_warn "  - Delete ALL data permanently"
   806→  buc_warn "  - Break billing associations"
   807→  buc_warn "  - Make the project unusable immediately"
   808→  buc_warn "  - Cannot be undone after 30-day grace period"
   809→  buc_warn "========================================================================"
   810→  buc_warn ""
   811→
   812→  buc_require "Type the exact project ID to confirm deletion" "${RBRR_DEPOT_PROJECT_ID}"
   813→  buc_require "Confirm you understand this DELETES EVERYTHING in the project" "DELETE-EVERYTHING"
   814→  buc_require "Final confirmation - type OBLITERATE to proceed" "OBLITERATE"
   815→
   816→  buc_step 'Check for liens (will block deletion)'
   817→  rbgu_http_json "GET" "${RBGC_API_ROOT_CRM}${RBGC_CRM_V1}/liens?parent=projects/${RBRR_DEPOT_PROJECT_ID}" "${z_token}" "${ZRBGG_INFIX_LIST_LIENS}"
   818→  rbgu_http_require_ok "List liens" "${ZRBGG_INFIX_LIST_LIENS}"
   819→
   820→  local z_lien_count
   821→  z_lien_count=$(rbgu_json_field_capture "${ZRBGG_INFIX_LIST_LIENS}" '.liens // [] | length') || buc_die "Failed to parse liens response"
   822→
   823→  if [[ "${z_lien_count}" -gt 0 ]]; then
   824→    buc_step 'BLOCKED: Liens exist on project'
   825→    buc_warn "Project has ${z_lien_count} lien(s) that prevent deletion"
   826→    buc_warn "You must remove all liens first:"
   827→    buc_code "  gcloud resource-manager liens list --project=${RBRR_DEPOT_PROJECT_ID}"
   828→    buc_code "  gcloud resource-manager liens delete LIEN_NAME --project=${RBRR_DEPOT_PROJECT_ID}"
   829→    buc_warn "Then re-run this command."
   830→    buc_die "Cannot proceed with active liens"
   831→  fi
   832→
   833→  buc_step 'Delete project (immediate lifecycle change to DELETE_REQUESTED)'
   834→  rbgu_http_json "DELETE" "${RBGD_API_CRM_DELETE_PROJECT}" "${z_token}" "${ZRBGG_INFIX_PROJECT_DELETE}"
   835→  rbgu_http_require_ok "Delete project" "${ZRBGG_INFIX_PROJECT_DELETE}"
   836→
   837→  buc_step 'Verify deletion state'
   838→  rbgu_http_json "GET" "${RBGD_API_CRM_GET_PROJECT}" "${z_token}" "${ZRBGG_INFIX_PROJECT_STATE}"
   839→  rbgu_http_require_ok "Get project state" "${ZRBGG_INFIX_PROJECT_STATE}"
   840→
   841→  local z_lifecycle_state
   842→  z_lifecycle_state=$(rbgu_json_field_capture "${ZRBGG_INFIX_PROJECT_STATE}" '.lifecycleState // "UNKNOWN"') || buc_die "Failed to parse project state"
   843→
   844→  if [[ "${z_lifecycle_state}" == "DELETE_REQUESTED" ]]; then
   845→    buc_success "Project successfully marked for deletion"
   846→    buc_step "Project Status: ${z_lifecycle_state}"
   847→    buc_step "Grace period: Up to 30 days"
   848→    buc_code "To restore (if still possible): rbgg_restore_project"
   849→    buc_step "WARNING: Project is now unusable but may remain visible in listings"
   850→  else
   851→    buc_die "Unexpected project state after deletion: ${z_lifecycle_state}"
   852→  fi
   853→}
   854→
   855→rbgg_restore_project() {
   856→  zrbgg_sentinel
   857→  buc_doc_brief "Attempt to restore a deleted project within the 30-day grace period"
   858→  buc_doc_shown || return 0
   859→
   860→  buc_step 'Mint admin OAuth token'
   861→  local z_token
   862→  z_token=$(rbgu_get_governor_token_capture) || buc_die "Failed to get admin token"
   863→
   864→  buc_step 'Check current project state'
   865→  rbgu_http_json "GET" "${RBGD_API_CRM_GET_PROJECT}" "${z_token}" "${ZRBGG_INFIX_PROJECT_STATE}"
   866→
   867→  if ! rbgu_http_is_ok "${ZRBGG_INFIX_PROJECT_STATE}"; then
   868→    buc_die "Cannot access project - it may have been permanently deleted or never existed"
   869→  fi
   870→
   871→  local z_lifecycle_state
   872→  z_lifecycle_state=$(rbgu_json_field_capture "${ZRBGG_INFIX_PROJECT_STATE}" '.lifecycleState // "UNKNOWN"') || buc_die "Failed to parse project state"
   873→
   874→  if [[ "${z_lifecycle_state}" != "DELETE_REQUESTED" ]]; then
   875→    buc_die "Project state is ${z_lifecycle_state} - can only restore projects in DELETE_REQUESTED state"
   876→  fi
   877→
   878→  buc_step 'Confirm restoration'
   879→  buc_log_args "Project Status: ${z_lifecycle_state}"
   880→  buc_log_args "Attempting to restore project: ${RBRR_DEPOT_PROJECT_ID}"
   881→  buc_log_args "WARNING: Restore may fail if deletion process has already started"
   882→  buc_require "Confirm restoration of project" "RESTORE"
   883→
   884→  buc_step 'Attempt project restoration'
   885→  rbgu_http_json "POST" "${RBGD_API_CRM_UNDELETE_PROJECT}" "${z_token}" "${ZRBGG_INFIX_PROJECT_RESTORE}"
   886→  if rbgu_http_is_ok                                                    "${ZRBGG_INFIX_PROJECT_RESTORE}"; then
   887→    buc_step 'Verify restoration'
   888→    rbgu_http_json "GET" "${RBGD_API_CRM_GET_PROJECT}" "${z_token}" "${ZRBGG_INFIX_PROJECT_STATE}"
   889→    rbgu_http_require_ok "Get restored project state"               "${ZRBGG_INFIX_PROJECT_STATE}"
   890→
   891→    z_lifecycle_state=$(rbgu_json_field_capture "${ZRBGG_INFIX_PROJECT_STATE}" '.lifecycleState // "UNKNOWN"') || buc_die "Failed to parse restored project state"
   892→
   893→    if [[ "${z_lifecycle_state}" == "ACTIVE" ]]; then
   894→      buc_success "Project successfully restored to ACTIVE state"
   895→      buc_log_args "Project Status: ${z_lifecycle_state}"
   896→      buc_log_args "Project is now usable again"
   897→    else
   898→      buc_die "Restoration completed but project state is unexpected: ${z_lifecycle_state}"
   899→    fi
   900→  else
   901→    local z_error_msg
   902→    z_error_msg=$(rbgu_json_field_capture "${ZRBGG_INFIX_PROJECT_RESTORE}" '.error.message // "Unknown error"') || z_error_msg="Failed to parse error"
   903→    buc_die "Project restoration failed: ${z_error_msg}"
   904→  fi
   905→}

   183→  rbgu_http_require_ok "Set repository IAM policy" "${ZRBGA_INFIX_REPO_IAM_SET}"

   226→rbga_repo_delete() {
   227→  zrbga_sentinel
   228→
   229→  local z_repo_name="${1:-}"
   230→  local z_location="${2:-${RBGC_GAR_LOCATION}}"
   231→
   232→  buc_doc_brief "Delete an Artifact Registry repository"
   233→  buc_doc_param "repo_name" "Name of the repository to delete"
   234→  buc_doc_param "location" "Location of the repository (optional, defaults to RBGC_GAR_LOCATION)"
   235→  buc_doc_shown || return 0
   236→
   237→  test -n "${z_repo_name}" || buc_die "Repository name required"
   238→  test -n "${z_location}" || buc_die "Location required"

   240→  buc_step "Deleting Artifact Registry repository: ${z_repo_name} in ${z_location}"
   241→
   242→  buc_log_args 'Get OAuth token from admin'
   243→  local z_token
   244→  z_token=$(rbgu_get_governor_token_capture) || buc_die "Failed to get admin token"
   245→
   246→  local z_resource="projects/${RBRR_DEPOT_PROJECT_ID}${RBGC_PATH_LOCATIONS}/${z_location}${RBGC_PATH_REPOSITORIES}/${z_repo_name}"
   247→  buc_log_args "Delete Artifact Registry repo '${z_repo_name}' in ${z_location}"

   249→  rbgu_http_json "DELETE"                                                           \
   250→    "${RBGC_API_ROOT_ARTIFACTREGISTRY}${RBGC_ARTIFACTREGISTRY_V1}/${z_resource}"    \

   252→  z_delete_code=$(rbgu_http_code_capture "${ZRBGA_INFIX_DELETE_REPO}") || z_delete_code="000"

   257→      local z_err

    63→zrbgb_list_bucket_objects_capture() {
    64→  zrbgb_sentinel

    66→  local z_token="${1}"
    67→  local z_bucket_name="${2}"
    68→
    69→  local z_list_url_base="${RBGC_API_ROOT_STORAGE}${RBGC_STORAGE_JSON_V1}/b/${z_bucket_name}/o"
    70→  local z_page_token=""
    71→  local z_first=1
    72→
    73→  while :; do
    74→    buc_log_args "Build URL with optional pageToken -> ${z_first}"
    75→    local z_url="${z_list_url_base}"
    76→    if test -n "${z_page_token}"; then
    77→      buc_log_args 'pageToken must be URL-encoded'
    78→      local z_tok_enc
    79→      z_tok_enc=$(rbgu_urlencode_capture "${z_page_token}") || return 1
    80→      z_url="${z_url}?pageToken=${z_tok_enc}"
    81→    fi
    82→
    83→    buc_log_args 'Use a unique infix per page to avoid clobbering files'
    84→    local z_infix="${ZRBGB_INFIX_LIST}${z_first}"
    85→    rbgu_http_json "GET" "${z_url}" "${z_token}" "${z_infix}"
    86→
    87→    local z_code
    88→    z_code=$(rbgu_http_code_capture "${z_infix}") || return 1
    89→    test "${z_code}" = "200" || return 1
    90→
    91→    buc_log_args 'Print names from this page (if any)'
    92→    buc_log_args 'Next page?'
    93→    jq -r                '.items[]?.name // empty' "${ZRBGU_PREFIX}${z_infix}${ZRBGU_POSTFIX_JSON}"  || return 1
    94→    z_page_token=$(jq -r '.nextPageToken // empty' "${ZRBGU_PREFIX}${z_infix}${ZRBGU_POSTFIX_JSON}") || return 1
    95→
    96→    test -n "${z_page_token}" || break
    97→    z_first=$((z_first + 1))
    98→  done

    72→# OAuth Authentication Functions (zrbgp_oauth_*)
    73→
    74→zrbgp_refresh_capture() {
    75→  zrbgp_sentinel
    76→
    77→  # RBRO credentials already loaded and validated by caller (rbgu_rbro_load)
    78→  zrbro_sentinel
    79→  test -n "${RBRP_OAUTH_CLIENT_ID:-}" || buc_die "RBRP_OAUTH_CLIENT_ID not set in environment"
    80→
    81→  buc_log_args "Exchanging refresh token for access token"
    82→
    83→  # Build request and pipe to curl - secrets never touch disk
    84→  local z_response
    85→  z_response=$(jq -n \
    86→    --arg refresh_token "${RBRO_REFRESH_TOKEN}" \
    87→    --arg client_id "${RBRP_OAUTH_CLIENT_ID}" \
    88→    --arg client_secret "${RBRO_CLIENT_SECRET}" \
    89→    --arg grant_type "refresh_token" \
    90→    '{
    91→      refresh_token: $refresh_token,
    92→      client_id: $client_id,
    93→      client_secret: $client_secret,
    94→      grant_type: $grant_type
    95→    }' | curl -sS -X POST \
    96→      --connect-timeout "${RBCC_CURL_CONNECT_TIMEOUT_SEC}" \
    97→      --max-time "${RBCC_CURL_MAX_TIME_SEC}" \
    98→      -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
    99→      -d @- \
   100→      "https://oauth2.googleapis.com/token") || buc_die "Failed to execute OAuth refresh request"
   101→
   102→  # Check for error in response
   103→  local z_error
   104→  z_error=$(jq -r '.error // empty' <<<"${z_response}")
   105→  if test -n "${z_error}"; then
   106→    local z_error_desc
   107→    z_error_desc=$(jq -r '.error_description // .error // "Unknown error"' <<<"${z_response}")
   108→    buc_die "OAuth credentials expired or invalid - run rbgp_payor_oauth_refresh: ${z_error_desc}"
   109→  fi
   110→
   111→  local z_access_token
   112→  z_access_token=$(jq -r '.access_token // empty' <<<"${z_response}")
   113→  test -n "${z_access_token}" || buc_die "OAuth response missing access_token"
   114→
   115→  echo "${z_access_token}"
   116→}
   117→
   118→# RBTOE: Payor OAuth Authentication Pattern
   119→# Establishes Payor OAuth context by loading RBRO credentials and obtaining access token
   120→zrbgp_authenticate_capture() {
   121→  zrbgp_sentinel
   122→  
   123→  buc_log_args "Establishing Payor OAuth authentication context"
   124→  
   125→  # Load RBRO credentials
   126→  rbgu_rbro_load
   127→  
   128→  # Load RBRP_OAUTH_CLIENT_ID from environment
   129→  test -n "${RBRP_OAUTH_CLIENT_ID:-}" || buc_die "RBRP_OAUTH_CLIENT_ID not set in environment"
   130→  
   131→  # Exchange refresh token for access token
   132→  local z_access_token
   133→  z_access_token=$(zrbgp_refresh_capture) || buc_die "Failed to exchange OAuth refresh token"
   134→  
   135→  test -n "${z_access_token}" || buc_die "Empty access token from OAuth exchange"
   136→  
   137→  buc_log_args "Payor OAuth authentication successful"
   138→  echo "${z_access_token}"
   139→}

   141→zrbgp_depot_list_update() {
   142→  zrbgp_sentinel
   143→
   144→  buc_log_args "Updating depot project tracking in RBRP configuration"
   145→
   146→  # Get OAuth access token
   147→  local z_access_token
   148→  z_access_token=$(zrbgp_authenticate_capture) || buc_die "Failed to authenticate for depot list update"
   149→
   150→  # Query active depot projects (CRM v1 allows listing accessible projects without parent)
   151→  # Using v1 instead of v3 which requires parent parameter
   152→  local -r z_list_url="${RBGC_API_ROOT_CRM}${RBGC_CRM_V1}/projects"
   153→  rbgu_http_json "GET" "${z_list_url}" "${z_access_token}" "depot_list_tracking"
   154→
   155→  # Non-blocking: if query fails, just log and continue (normal on first install with no projects)
   156→  if ! rbgu_http_require_ok "Query depot projects" "depot_list_tracking" 2>/dev/null; then
   157→    buc_log_args "Depot project list query skipped (expected on first install or API access restrictions)"
   158→    return 0
   159→  fi
   160→  
   161→  # Extract and validate depot project IDs
   162→  local z_depot_ids=""
   163→  local z_project_count
   164→  z_project_count=$(rbgu_json_field_capture "depot_list_tracking" '.projects // [] | length') || z_project_count=0
   165→  
   166→  if [ "${z_project_count}" -gt 0 ]; then
   167→    local z_index=0
   168→    while [ "${z_index}" -lt "${z_project_count}" ]; do
   169→      local z_project_id
   170→      z_project_id=$(rbgu_json_field_capture "depot_list_tracking" ".projects[${z_index}].projectId") || continue
   171→      
   172→      # Validate depot project ID pattern (global namespace)
   173→      if printf '%s' "${z_project_id}" | grep -qE "${RBGC_GLOBAL_DEPOT_REGEX}"; then
   174→        z_depot_ids="${z_depot_ids} ${z_project_id}"
   175→      else
   176→        buc_log_args "Warning: Skipping project with invalid depot pattern: ${z_project_id}"
   177→      fi
   178→      
   179→      z_index=$((z_index + 1))
   180→    done
   181→  fi
   182→  
   183→  # Update RBRP configuration
   184→  # Note: This would normally update rbrp.env file
   185→  # For now, we'll export to environment and log the result
   186→  buc_log_args "Found ${z_project_count} depot projects, ${z_depot_ids:+ $(($(printf '%s' "${z_depot_ids}" | wc -w))):+0} valid"
   187→
   188→  return 0
   189→}

   303→######################################################################
   304→# Capture: list required services that are NOT enabled (blank = all enabled)
   305→zrbgp_required_apis_missing_capture() {
   306→  zrbgp_sentinel
   307→
   308→  local -r z_token="${1:-}"
   309→  test -n "${z_token}" || { echo ""; return 1; }
   310→
   311→  local z_missing=""
   312→  local z_api=""
   313→  local z_service=""
   314→  local z_infix=""
   315→  local z_state=""
   316→  local z_code=""
   317→
   318→  for z_api in                       \
   319→    "${RBGC_API_SU_VERIFY_CRM}"      \
   320→    "${RBGC_API_SU_VERIFY_GAR}"      \
   321→    "${RBGC_API_SU_VERIFY_IAM}"      \
   322→    "${RBGC_API_SU_VERIFY_BUILD}"    \
   323→    "${RBGC_API_SU_VERIFY_ANALYSIS}" \
   324→    "${RBGC_API_SU_VERIFY_STORAGE}"
   325→  do
   326→    z_service="${z_api##*/}"
   327→    z_infix="${ZRBGP_INFIX_API_CHECK}_${z_service}"
   328→
   329→    rbgu_http_json "GET" "${z_api}" "${z_token}" "${z_infix}" || true
   330→
   331→    buc_log_args 'If we cannot even read an HTTP code file, that is a processing failure.'
   332→    z_code=$(rbgu_http_code_capture "${z_infix}") || z_code=""
   333→    test -n "${z_code}" || return 1
   334→
   335→    if test "${z_code}" = "200"; then
   336→      z_state=$(rbgu_json_field_capture "${z_infix}" ".state") || z_state=""
   337→      test "${z_state}" = "ENABLED" || z_missing="${z_missing} ${z_service}"
   338→    else
   339→      buc_log_args 'Any non-200 (403/404/5xx/etc) => treat as NOT enabled'
   340→      z_missing="${z_missing} ${z_service}"
   341→    fi
   342→  done
   343→
   344→  printf '%s' "${z_missing# }"
   345→}

   398→rbgp_payor_install() {
   399→  zrbgp_sentinel
   400→
   401→  local -r z_oauth_json_file="${1:-}"
   402→
   403→  buc_doc_brief "Install Payor OAuth credentials from client JSON file following RBAGS specification"
   404→  buc_doc_param "oauth_json_file" "Path to downloaded OAuth client JSON file from establish procedure"
   405→  buc_doc_lines "REQUIREMENT: OAuth consent screen must be configured in testing mode"
   406→  buc_doc_lines "            and the Payor project must have required APIs enabled"
   407→  buc_doc_lines "REQUIREMENT: RBRP_BILLING_ACCOUNT_ID must be set in environment"
   408→  buc_doc_shown || return 0
   409→
   410→  buc_step 'Validate environment prerequisites'
   411→  test -n "${RBRP_BILLING_ACCOUNT_ID:-}" || buc_die "RBRP_BILLING_ACCOUNT_ID not set in environment - obtain from Cloud Console Billing and set before proceeding"
   412→
   413→  buc_step 'Validate input parameters'
   414→  test -n "${z_oauth_json_file}" || buc_die "OAuth JSON file path required as first argument"
   415→  test -f "${z_oauth_json_file}" || buc_die "OAuth JSON file not found: ${z_oauth_json_file}"
   416→
   417→  buc_step 'Parse OAuth client JSON'
   418→  local z_client_id
   419→  z_client_id=$(jq -r '.installed.client_id // .client_id // empty' "${z_oauth_json_file}" 2>/dev/null) || buc_die "Failed to parse OAuth JSON file"
   420→  test -n "${z_client_id}" || buc_die "OAuth JSON file missing client_id field"
   421→  
   422→  local z_client_secret
   423→  z_client_secret=$(jq -r '.installed.client_secret // .client_secret // empty' "${z_oauth_json_file}" 2>/dev/null) || buc_die "Failed to extract client_secret from OAuth JSON file"
   424→  test -n "${z_client_secret}" || buc_die "OAuth JSON file missing client_secret field"
   425→  
   426→  local z_project_id
   427→  z_project_id=$(jq -r '.installed.project_id // .project_id // empty' "${z_oauth_json_file}" 2>/dev/null) || buc_die "Failed to extract project_id from OAuth JSON file"
   428→  test -n "${z_project_id}" || buc_die "OAuth JSON file missing project_id field"
   429→
   430→  buc_step 'Check existing credentials'
   431→  local -r z_rbro_file="${RBDC_PAYOR_RBRO_FILE}"
   432→  if test -f "${z_rbro_file}"; then
   433→    buc_log_args "Existing RBRO credentials will be replaced"
   434→  fi
   435→
   436→  local z_refresh_token=""
   437→  buc_step 'OAuth authorization flow'
   438→  local -r z_auth_url="https://accounts.google.com/o/oauth2/v2/auth?client_id=${z_client_id}&redirect_uri=urn:ietf:wg:oauth:2.0:oob&scope=openid%20email%20https://www.googleapis.com/auth/cloud-platform%20https://www.googleapis.com/auth/cloud-billing&response_type=code&access_type=offline"
   439→
   440→  bug_e
   441→  bug_link "Open this URL in your browser: " "Google OAuth Authorization" "${z_auth_url}"
   442→  bug_e
   443→  bug_t  "You will see three or four screens:"
   444→  bug_tut "  1. " "Choose an account" " - Select the Google account for this payor"
   445→  bug_tut "  2. If screen says " "Google hasn't verified this app" ", click Continue"
   446→  bug_t   "     Otherwise, proceed to next step"
   447→  bug_tut "  3. " "Recipe Bottle Payor wants access" " - Review the requested permissions"
   448→  bug_tu  "     Check the permission checkboxes to grant access, then click " "Continue"
   449→  bug_t   "  4. Authorization code will be displayed"
   450→  bug_e
   451→  local z_auth_code
   452→  z_auth_code=$(bug_prompt "Copy the authorization code and paste here: ")
   453→  test -n "${z_auth_code}" || buc_die "Authorization code is required"
   454→
   455→  buc_log_args "Exchanging authorization code for tokens"
   456→
   457→  # Build request and pipe to curl - secrets never touch disk
   458→  local z_response
   459→  z_response=$(jq -n \
   460→    --arg code "${z_auth_code}" \
   461→    --arg client_id "${z_client_id}" \
   462→    --arg client_secret "${z_client_secret}" \
   463→    --arg redirect_uri "urn:ietf:wg:oauth:2.0:oob" \
   464→    --arg grant_type "authorization_code" \
   465→    '{
   466→      code: $code,
   467→      client_id: $client_id,
   468→      client_secret: $client_secret,
   469→      redirect_uri: $redirect_uri,
   470→      grant_type: $grant_type
   471→    }' | curl -sS -X POST \
   472→      --connect-timeout "${RBCC_CURL_CONNECT_TIMEOUT_SEC}" \
   473→      --max-time "${RBCC_CURL_MAX_TIME_SEC}" \
   474→      -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
   475→      -d @- \
   476→      "https://oauth2.googleapis.com/token") || buc_die "Failed to execute token exchange request"
   477→
